description.ko: 음파가 물리적인 수정 건축물로 변하는 과정을 통해 보이지 않는 주파수의 공명과 에너지를 시각화합니다.
description.en: Sound waves transformed into physical crystalline architecture, visualizing the resonance and energy of invisible frequencies.

prompt: A cinematic 3D sound visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Harmonic Monolith.' A central vibrating geometric core generates complex #4169E1 royal blue frequency waves that solidify into floating crystalline lattices. The surrounding dark void is filled with #32CD32 green kinetic particles and #FFD700 gold light trails reacting to a rhythmic pulse of #FF4500 electric orange energy. Hyper-detailed ray tracing, intricate holographic UI elements reflecting frequency data, and fluid motion blur. 8k resolution, visualizing the physical architecture of sound in a vacuum of silence.
